svg.title: Tour Booking System – High-Level Microservices Architecture
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing browser client, API gateway, service registry, load balancer, core microservices, database, and DevOps layers.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the React frontend in the Tour Booking System')
sendPrompt('What does the API Gateway do in microservices?')
sendPrompt('How does Eureka service discovery work?')
sendPrompt('How does load balancing work with Spring Cloud?')
sendPrompt('What does the Tour Service microservice handle?')
sendPrompt('What does the Booking Service microservice handle?')
sendPrompt('What does the User Service microservice handle?')
sendPrompt('What does the Payment Service microservice handle?')
sendPrompt('Why use MariaDB or MySQL with Spring Data JPA?')
sendPrompt('How does Spring Data JPA simplify persistence?')
sendPrompt('How do Jenkins and Docker work together for CI/CD?')
